this diagram models two classes: "puntina della mappa" and "suggerimento". the "puntina della mappa" class contains attributes for geographical coordinates, air quality, temperature, weather status, humidity, wind speed, pressure, and a category indicating environmental conditions. it also has methods to set and get these attributes. the "suggerimento" class includes attributes for title, text, image, and a category, along with methods to set and get these attributes. there is an association between the two classes indicated by "n" on both sides, suggesting a many-to-many relationship.

schermata iniziale -> seleziona la tua posizione attuale — type=control_flow; label=""; explanation="flow to select current position"

seleziona la tua posizione attuale -> viene effettuata la richiesta al server — type=control_flow; label=""; explanation="request sent to server"

flow 2: schermata iniziale -> seleziona la tua posizione attuale -> viene effettuata la richiesta al server -> presenta i dati ritornati
this activity diagram models a process for selecting a location (state, region, city or current position) and then presenting the returned data.
the process starts with an initial screen.
users can either select a state, region, and city or select their current position.
after selection, a request is sent to the server.
finally, the returned data is presented.
there are two main flows: one for selecting a location and one for selecting the current position.
mappa iniziale -> ricaricare i dati scrollando giu — type=flow; label="->"; explanation="start to data loading"
ricaricare i dati scrollando giu -> il server riceve la richiesta e invia dati nuovi — type=flow; label="->"; explanation="request received and new data sent"
il server riceve la richiesta e invia dati nuovi -> mappa aggiornata — type=flow; label="->"; explanation="data updated and sent back"
flow 1: mappa iniziale -> ricaricare i dati scrollando giu -> il server riceve la richiesta e invia dati nuovi -> mappa aggiornata
this activity diagram models the process of updating a map.
the initial state is the "mappa iniziale" (initial map state).
the process involves loading new data by scrolling down ("ricaricare i dati scrollando giu").
the server receives the request and sends new data ("il server riceve la richiesta e invia dati nuovi").
the final state is the "mappa aggiornata" (updated map state).
there are no conditions or branches in the diagram.
the process is linear and does not involve any loops or repetitions.
mappa inziale -> premere il pulsante per i suggerimenti — type=control-flow; label="->"; explanation="flow from initial map to button press"
premere il pulsante per i suggerimenti -> schermata suggerimenti — type=control-flow; label="->"; explanation="flow from button press to suggestions screen"
flow 1: mappa inziale -> premere il pulsante per i suggerimenti -> schermata suggerimenti
this activity diagram models a process involving three steps: starting with an initial map, pressing a button to trigger suggestions, and displaying the suggestions screen.
the process begins with the initial map and progresses through pressing a button to access the suggestions screen.
there are no conditions, branches, or loops visible in the diagram.

this sequence diagram illustrates the interaction between a user, an air quality activity, and a main activity within an application. the user starts the application, which then loads countries, retrieves states, regions, and cities. an intent is initiated to the main activity, which retrieves http data from the server and presents it to the user through a message handler. the diagram highlights the flow of data and control between these components, emphasizing the retrieval of geographical data and the handling of http requests.

widget provider -> airvisual api — type=message; label="updateappwidget()"; explanation="widget requests data update"

flow 1: utente -> widget provider — onenable() -> widget provider -> widget provider — onupdate() -> widget provider -> airvisual api — updateappwidget() -> airvisual api -> widget provider — recupera i dati -> widget provider -> utente — presenta i dati all'utente
a user enables a widget, which then updates itself periodically.
the widget provider sends a request to the airvisual api to retrieve data.
the api returns the data, which is then presented to the user through the widget.
the process is continuous, with the widget updating itself and requesting new data from the api.
utente -> map activity — type=message; label="l'utente vuole visualizzare la mappa"; explanation="user requests map display"

map activity -> airvisual api — type=message; label="vengono ritornati i nuovi dati"; explanation="returns new data"

flow 1: utente -> map activity — "l'utente vuole visualizzare la mappa" -> map activity -> map activity — "la web view effettua il refresh dei dati" -> map activity -> map activity — "vengono ritornati i nuovi dati"
this sequence diagram models the interaction between a user, a map activity, and an airvisual api.
the user initiates the request to visualize the map.
the map activity then refreshes the data via the web view.
new data is returned to the map activity, which updates the map accordingly.
the process is iterative, with the web view continuously refreshing the data.
utente -> posizione — type=association; label="l'utente decide la nazione, la regione e la città di interesse"; explanation="user selects country, region, and city of interest"

tips -> activitytips — type=association; label="getconsigliperaqi(int aqi)"; explanation="get tips for aqi level"
activitytips -> utente — type=association; label="ritorna dati"; explanation="return data to user"
flow 1: utente -> posizione -> tips -> activitytips -> utente
this activity diagram models a process where a user selects a country, region, and city of interest.
the selected location's air quality index (aqi) is retrieved from the position service.
based on the aqi, tips are fetched from the tips service.
finally, the activity tips are returned to the user.
the diagram does not show any branching conditions or loops.
